latest.title: Ocean waves hide a flicker of light you missed

latest.title: Lava doesn't explode like Hollywood thinks
latest.script_key: lava never explodes upwards it just oozes that black steam you see isn t from the lava itself it s superheated water vapor from melted snow or rain hitting the molten rock that s why you get those dramatic plumes so next time you see an action movie lava burst remember real lava creeps slower than you d think
